function.description: Check that the local Study Anything API is reachable before starting a learning loop. Method: GET /v1/health.
function.name: study_anything_health

function.description: Create a learning session for a local user. Use demo mode only for smoke tests. Method: POST /v1/sessions.
function.name: study_anything_create_session

use_demo_agent.description: True only for local demos and CI smoke tests. Real learning should use the configured user-owned agent.

function.description: Attach source material gathered by the platform agent to the learning session. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/reading.
function.name: study_anything_add_reading

reference.description: Stable citation, URL, file reference, or platform-local source id.

text.description: Source excerpt. Do not include secrets.

function.description: Validate a Learning Context Package built by a platform Agent before importing web, document, video, app, Markdown, or Obsidian context into Study Anything. Method: POST /v1/context-packages/validate.
function.name: study_anything_validate_context_package

package.description: learning-context-package-v1 JSON. It may include bounded source excerpts, but must not include Agent credentials or API keys.

function.description: Create a learning session directly from a validated Learning Context Package. Method: POST /v1/sessions/from-context-package.
function.name: study_anything_create_session_from_context_package

track.description: Optional override. If omitted, Study Anything uses package.track or ACADEMIC.

use_demo_agent.description: True only for local demos and CI smoke tests.

function.description: Expand an existing learning session with a Learning Context Package. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/context-package.
function.name: study_anything_append_context_package

function.description: Read the public Study Anything Plugin SDK contract without executing plugin code. Method: GET /v1/plugins/sdk.
function.name: study_anything_plugin_sdk

function.description: List installed plugin hooks, capabilities, trust summaries, and alpha runtime contracts without executing plugin code. Method: GET /v1/plugins/capabilities.
function.name: study_anything_plugin_capabilities

function.description: Validate one explicitly selected local plugin package against the SDK contract without installing or executing it. Method: POST /v1/plugins/validate-package.
function.name: study_anything_validate_plugin_package

source_path.description: Local path visible to the Study Anything API host.

function.description: Run a locally installed importer plugin after explicit permission confirmation and return a validated Learning Context Package. Method: POST /v1/importers/{plugin_id}/run.
function.name: study_anything_run_importer

allow_network.description: Only true after the platform Agent has reviewed and accepted network:http.

confirmed_permissions.description: Must match the importer manifest permissions exactly.

inputs.description: Keyword arguments passed to the importer's build_context_package function.

plugin_id.description: Importer plugin id, such as example-note-importer.

function.description: Check whether optional retrieval projection is disabled, healthy, or unavailable. Method: GET /v1/retrieval/status.
function.name: study_anything_retrieval_status

function.description: Rebuild the optional retrieval index for one session from canonical Study Anything session state. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/retrieval/rebuild.
function.name: study_anything_retrieval_rebuild

function.description: Search the rebuilt retrieval index for one session and return minimal source snippets. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/retrieval/search.
function.name: study_anything_retrieval_search

function.description: Return redacted retrieval/context quality gates for a rebuilt retrieval index and query. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/retrieval/eval.
function.name: study_anything_retrieval_quality_eval

function.description: Create a new learning session from retrieval results produced by an existing indexed session. Method: POST /v1/sessions/from-retrieval.
function.name: study_anything_create_session_from_retrieval

use_demo_agent.description: True only for local demos and CI smoke tests.

function.description: Expand an existing learning session with a Learning Context Package generated from retrieval results. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/retrieval/context-package.
function.name: study_anything_append_retrieval_context

function.description: Attach web, document, video-slice, app-context, Markdown, or Obsidian excerpts gathered by the platform agent and convert them into a Study Anything learning source bundle. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/enrichment.
function.name: study_anything_add_enrichment

excerpt_hash.description: Optional sha256 hash supplied by the platform agent; Study Anything recomputes and rejects mismatches.

locator.description: Page, timestamp range, app object id, or other platform-local locator.

reference.description: Optional stable reference for the whole enrichment bundle.

function.description: Advance the Study Anything workflow after a source is attached or after HITL resolution. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/run.
function.name: study_anything_run

function.description: Generate layered teaching output such as whole-topic overview, glossary, examples, or Obsidian-style notes through user-owned Agent capabilities. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/teaching-layers.
function.name: study_anything_teaching_layers

layers.description: Teaching layers to generate. Each layer routes to a separate Agent capability default.

function.description: Submit the learner's answer to one or more quiz items and advance mastery evaluation. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/answers.
function.name: study_anything_answer

answers.description: Map of quiz item id to learner answer.

function.description: Read the compact mastery state for the completed learning loop. Method: GET /v1/sessions/{session_id}/mastery.
function.name: study_anything_mastery

function.description: Return redacted proof that Study Anything Agent providers handled the required learning tasks. Method: GET /v1/sessions/{session_id}/agent-audit.
function.name: study_anything_agent_audit

function.description: Return the redacted eval bridge for Promptfoo, DeepEval, LangChain AgentEvals, and Ragas. Method: GET /v1/sessions/{session_id}/agent-eval/artifact.
function.name: study_anything_agent_eval_artifact

function.description: Return a redacted deterministic quality report that separates invocation proof, schema contract validity, and minimum teaching-quality gates. Method: GET /v1/sessions/{session_id}/agent-eval/quality.
function.name: study_anything_agent_quality_eval

function.description: Return an Obsidian-compatible Markdown note with source references, teaching layers, quiz review, mastery, insights, and enrichment references. Method: GET /v1/sessions/{session_id}/exports/obsidian.
function.name: study_anything_obsidian_export

function.description: Return a redacted Markdown and HTML micro-lesson built from platform-collected enrichment references for Kimi, Codex, WorkBuddy, NotebookLM-style, or Obsidian workflows. Method: GET /v1/sessions/{session_id}/exports/enrichment-artifact.
function.name: study_anything_enrichment_artifact_export

function.description: Return a portable redacted learning package for platform agents, NotebookLM-style bridges, Obsidian pipelines, and local archive workflows. Method: GET /v1/sessions/{session_id}/exports/learning-package.
function.name: study_anything_learning_package_export

function.description: Return the strict redacted second-brain handoff for Obsidian, NotebookLM-style manual import, local archives, Kimi, Codex, and WorkBuddy-style platform Agents. Method: GET /v1/sessions/{session_id}/exports/second-brain-handoff.
function.name: study_anything_second_brain_handoff_export
